name: Jet Ski Cruise
description: Third-person jet ski — key 1 = meteor shower, key 2 = sunset glow, key 3 = rides with torch, director: shark appears / shark lunges

base.default: A man in a red life vest on a white and red jet ski on turquoise water near a sandy beach lined with palm trees, a distant rocky outcrop on the horizon. Sunlit coastal atmosphere with light glinting off the calm sea. The jet ski stays up on the surface of the water the whole time, planing across the top of the waves — it never sinks, submerges, or goes underwater, always riding on the surface.

default.static: Third-person view, the man on the jet ski locked at the exact centre of the frame at constant size and distance. Neither the man nor the camera moves on its own; arrow-key look-input is the only source of camera motion, arcing the camera around the stationary, centred rider only while held.
default.dynamic: Strict third-person rear view, the man on the jet ski locked at the exact centre of the frame as the camera holds a fixed position behind him and tracks him forward. The camera does not rotate around the rider; look-input becomes the jet ski changing heading.

default.static: The man sits upright on the jet ski, hands resting on the handlebars, the craft bobbing gently on the swell as small wavelets lap against the hull and the calm water settles around it.
default.dynamic: The jet ski surges forward across the water, its rear thruster churning the turquoise sea into a wake of white foam, spray fanning out to either side as the man leans into the ride and the hull skips over the swell.

events.name: Meteor Shower
events.detail: Single meteors fall from high in the sky one after another — each a giant burning ball of rock dragging a long tail of fire and smoke straight down toward the sea. One by one they crash into the water far off near the horizon, away from the rider and never on the path ahead, each erupting in a huge fiery explosion and a towering burst of white spray before the next one follows.

events.name: Sunset Glow
events.detail: The daylight deepens into a fiery sunset: the sun sinks low and rests right on the horizon, a huge, swollen orange-red disc half-dipping into the sea, while the sky above ignites in deep bands of amber, rose, and violet. Directly beneath it, the sun's reflection blazes across the water — a brilliant, unbroken path of molten gold stretching from the horizon straight toward the viewer, the rippling sea breaking it into shimmering streaks on every wavelet, the beach glowing warm amber.

events.name: Rides with Torch
events.detail: The rider raises a burning torch high overhead in one hand, its orange flame streaming and flickering in the wind and trailing a ribbon of smoke, while his other hand grips the handlebars and the jet ski drives forward across the water, spray fanning off the hull.

events.name: Jump the Wake
events.detail: The rider guns the throttle up the face of a swell and launches the jet ski clean off the crest into the air, spray fanning out beneath him, then splashes back down onto the turquoise water and levels back out. EXACTLY ONE jet ski and ONE rider in frame — a single lone rider, no second jet ski, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Hard Carve
events.detail: The rider leans hard into a sharp banking turn, the jet ski carving across the water and throwing a tall arc of spray off its side, then straightens back onto a level heading. EXACTLY ONE jet ski and ONE rider in frame — a single lone rider, no second jet ski, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Throttle Boost
events.detail: The rider slams the throttle wide open for a burst of speed, the nose of the jet ski lifting as a long rooster-tail of spray streams up behind him, then eases back down to a steady cruising pace. EXACTLY ONE jet ski and ONE rider in frame — a single lone rider, no second jet ski, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Spin 360
events.detail: The rider whips the jet ski into a tight spinning 360, the hull skating around and sweeping a full ring of spray across the water, then settles back facing forward. EXACTLY ONE jet ski and ONE rider in frame — a single lone rider, no second jet ski, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Barrel Roll
events.detail: The rider launches the jet ski off a wave and rolls it fully over in mid-air, a complete barrel roll above the turquoise water, before coming back down and landing upright, riding on. EXACTLY ONE jet ski and ONE rider in frame — a single lone rider, no second jet ski, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Cut the Engine
events.detail: The rider throttles down and coasts to a gentle stop, the jet ski bobbing on the swell with the engine idling and the water settling around it, then throttles back up and rides on. EXACTLY ONE jet ski and ONE rider in frame — a single lone rider, no second jet ski, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Wave to Shore
events.detail: The rider lifts one hand off the handlebar and waves toward the palm-lined beach as the jet ski coasts along, then grips the handlebar again and rides on. EXACTLY ONE jet ski and ONE rider in frame — a single lone rider, no second jet ski, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Shark Appears
events.detail: A single dark triangular dorsal fin rises and cuts through the turquoise water ahead, slicing across the surface and crossing the jet ski's path — ONLY the top fin shows above the water, the shark's body staying hidden below the surface; the fin stays, circling on the surface nearby. EXACTLY ONE shark in the water — a single lone shark, no second shark, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Shark Lunges
events.detail: The dark dorsal fin surges fast across the surface straight toward the jet ski, cutting a sharp wake right up alongside it in a rush of spray — ONLY the top fin breaks the surface, the shark's body staying below the water — then it veers off and keeps pace through the wake. EXACTLY ONE shark in the water — a single lone shark, no second shark, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Dolphins Leap Alongside
events.detail: A pod of sleek dolphins surfaces and leaps in formation alongside the jet ski, arcing out of the turquoise water and diving back in one after another, spray glittering in the sunlight as they keep pace beside the rider, then peel away back into the sea.

events.name: Storm Rolls In
events.detail: The sky darkens as heavy storm clouds roll across the sun, the wind whips up, and the calm turquoise sea churns into grey chop crested with whitecaps while cold rain sweeps across the water, streaking the surface and drumming on the jet ski.

events.name: Waterspout Forms
events.detail: A towering waterspout twists up from the sea on the horizon ahead — a swirling column of water and mist spinning between the dark clouds and the churning surface, dragging a ring of spray around its base as it looms out across the water ahead.

events.name: Whale Breaches
events.detail: The rider on the jet ski remains the main subject, unchanged, while off to one side a massive whale breaches out of the deep — a huge dark body rising clear of the sea and crashing back down in an enormous explosion of white spray and rolling waves, before it slips back beneath the surface.

events.name: Bioluminescent Night
events.detail: The scene sweeps into night: the sky deepens to star-scattered black and the water turns dark, and everywhere the jet ski cuts the surface it blazes with electric-blue bioluminescence, glowing trails and swirls lighting up in its wake and around the hull.

events.name: Volcanic Island Erupts
events.detail: The distant rocky outcrop on the horizon erupts into a volcano — glowing orange lava streaming down its slopes and a towering plume of black ash and smoke rising into the sky, embers raining into the sea around its base and lighting the water with a deep red glow across the swell.

events.name: Rogue Wave
events.detail: A towering rogue wave rears up ahead — a steep wall of dark water rising far above the jet ski, its crest curling and foaming as it sweeps toward the rider, then it barrels down in a churning collapse of white spray and heaving surf before the sea levels back out.

scene.jumpPrompt: The man and his jet ski leap up off the water, the hull lifting clear of the sea surface and rising into the air for a moment before dropping back down with a splash.
scene.crouchPrompt: The camera lowers toward the ground as the character crouches down low, bending the knees and ducking the head into a compact, hunched stance; the viewpoint sinks smoothly to a low, near-ground vantage and settles there, close to the floor.
scene.standPrompt: The character straightens back up out of the crouch, rising to full standing height as the camera lifts smoothly back to its normal eye-level vantage.
